body:
This pull request sets the compat entry for the `RRTMGP` package to `0.6`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
Note: Consider registering a new release of your package immediately after merging this PR, as downstream packages may depend on this for tests to pass.
title: CompatHelper: add new compat entry for RRTMGP at version 0.6, (keep existing compat)

body: This PR unifies a few edmf types with dycore types.
title: Unify types, fix inconsistencies

body: This PR fixes some vector conversions
title: Fix some vector conversions

<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Plot EDMF profiles from main branch in buildkite runs in a PR. 


## To-do
- [x] find out how buildkite saves output.
- [x] Find out how to consistently get the most recent (latest) ref counter data-folder
- [x] Plot edmf static profiles

## Outstanding issues for a future PR:
- [ ] Plot profiles from TRMM longrun (requires saving longrun hfd5 output)
- [ ] Plot also LES lines on profiles (requires storing LES data somewhere)
- [ ] Plot edmf movies (requires saving timeseries as hdf5 data)
title: plots vs main

plot updraft vertical velocity and environment vertical velocity separately in edmf profiles.
These are typically orders of magnitude different, so for comparisons with main, it makes more sense to plot them separately.
